TUNNEL_LOAD_NORMAL.desc: Load TUNNEL with an IPv4 destination.

TUNNEL_LOAD_IPV6.desc: Load TUNNEL with IPv6 source and destination addresses.

TUNNEL_INVALID_ADDR.desc: Load TUNNEL with invalid IP address.

TUNNEL_MIXED_AF.desc: Load TUNNEL with mismatched address families (IPv4 src_ip + IPv6 dst_ip) must be rejected.
